title: Shauryotsava-2025
description: Annual sports festival of IET Lucknow with the tagline 'PLAY LIKE THERE'S NO TOMORROW'. A multi-day sporting event featuring various competitions and athletic activities.
location: IET Lucknow Campus, Sitapur Road, Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh 226021

title: Encore-26: Nawabi Elegance
description: Annual cultural festival of IET Lucknow celebrating the Nawabi Elegance theme. Features 30+ events, 10K+ footfall, ₹2L+ prize pool with 5+ celebrity appearances.
location: IET Lucknow Campus, Sitapur Road, Lucknow

title: Smart India Hackathon 2023
description: National level hackathon organized in collaboration with the Institution's Innovation Council (IIC) to develop solutions for real-world problems.

title: IEEE Women in Engineering Day 2025
description: Celebrates the achievements and contributions of women in engineering. Organized by IEEE Student Chapter.

title: World Environment Day 2025
description: Environmental awareness program organized by IEEE Student Chapter.

title: World Telecommunication and Information Society Day 2025
description: Celebrates the role of telecommunications and ICT in today's society.

title: Graduate Talk Series 2025
description: Series of talks by graduate students and professionals sharing their experiences and knowledge.

title: Vis-à-Vis 2025
description: Annual literary and communication-based initiative for first-year Electrical Engineering students featuring four segments: Group Discussion, Presentation, JAM (Just A Minute), and Debate.

title: Teacher's Day Celebration 2025
description: Annual celebration honoring teachers and their contributions to education and student development. Organized by Electrical Engineering Society.

title: Menstrual Health and Hygiene Awareness Program
description: Focus on menstrual health, hygiene, and cervical cancer prevention and awareness.

title: MECHFEST
description: Technical and cultural festival organized by the Mechanical Engineering Department. Features technical competitions and cultural events to complement academics.
organizer: Mechanical Engineering Forum (MEF), Department of Mechanical Engineering

title: Srishti - Annual MEF Publication
description: Annual publication by Mechanical Engineering Department dedicated to mechanical engineering enthusiasts. Platform for artistic expression, knowledge sharing, and student contributions.

title: Sexual Harassment Prevention Program
description: Series of activities organized by Sarojini Girls Hostel aimed at addressing and preventing sexual harassment at workplace. Includes workshops and awareness sessions.

title: Vishvkarma Pooja 2024
description: Traditional celebration honoring Vishvkarma (deity of craftsmanship and engineering).

title: रक्तदान को सम्मान 2024 (Blood Donation Camp 2024)
description: Blood donation camp organized to encourage students and staff to contribute to society through blood donation.

title: IEEE Women in Engineering Day 2024
description: Celebrates the achievements and contributions of women in engineering and IEEE.

title: Keynote Lecture by Prof. Neelam Srivastava
description: Distinguished lecture by Professor Neelam Srivastava on specialized technical topics.

title: World Telecommunication and Information Society Day 2024
description: Celebrates the role of telecommunications and information communication technologies.

title: BioSpark 2024
description: Event focused on biotechnology, biosciences, and related technical domains.

title: Intelligentzia: Hackathon 2021
description: Hackathon organized by Institution's Innovation Council (IIC) for 'fabricating solutions for the contemporary world'. Grand finale held on July 15, 2021.

title: IIC Workshop Series 2021-2022
description: Series of workshops organized by Institution's Innovation Council covering topics like:
topics: Entrepreneurship and Innovation as Career Opportunity
How to Plan for Startup (Legal & Ethical Steps)

title: Mentorship Sessions for Innovators
description: Regular mentorship sessions conducted by Innovation Ambassadors for student entrepreneurs and innovators.

title: IDEA-BOX - Monthly Innovation Platform
description: Platform where IET students can submit innovative ideas monthly. Winners recognized and rewarded. Ongoing program throughout academic year.

title: E-Cell Events and Activities
description: Entrepreneurship Cell organizes regular events for students interested in startups, innovation, and business development. Includes competitions, workshops, and networking sessions.

title: Navyug Navachar Foundation (NNF) - Startup Incubation
description: Startup incubation center providing infrastructure, mentorship, funding support, and investor connect for student entrepreneurs and startup founders.
location: 3rd Floor, New Mechanical & Chemical Building, IET Lucknow

title: Parmarth - Social Service Club
description: Social club dedicated to community development and social welfare. Works in slum areas providing education, healthcare, and support. Services include: classes for underprivileged children, girls' education, RTE school admissions, and social services.

title: Google Developer Student Club (GDSC)
description: Community for students interested in Google technologies and developer skills. Regular workshops, talks, and collaborative projects.
organizer: Google Developer Student Club @ IET Lucknow

title: SEED (Society for Electronics Exploration and Development)
description: Technical society focused on electronics, embedded systems, and related technologies. Organizes workshops, projects, and technical competitions.
organizer: Society for Electronics Exploration and Development (SEED)

title: Electrical Engineering Society Activities
description: Active society organizing technical events, workshops, industrial visits, and competitions for Electrical Engineering students.
organizer: Electrical Engineering Society (EES), Department of Electrical Engineering

title: IEEE Student Chapter @ IET Lucknow
description: IEEE Student Chapter providing access to research papers, journals, and technical resources. Organizes seminars, workshops, and awareness programs on latest technological trends.

title: ISSACC Events and Activities
description: Information Systems and Software Application Committee organizing technical events and activities.
